title: Number 20 Balloons Silver, 40Inch Large Foil Number 2 & 0 Balloons with 6 Silver Confetti Helium Balloons, 2nd 20th Birthday Balloon for Girls Boys Party Romantic Occasions Anniversary Decorations
features: Silver Number Balloons 20:Includes 2 pcs * 40 inches (101 cm) self-inflating silver number balloons(number 0 + number 2), 6pcs 12inch silver confetti balloons,a 10m ribbon, extra large enough to decorate your family and friends' birthday parties, It is the choice for your birthday party balloon decoration

Durable Quality Material:This giant 40" mylar number balloons are made of durable-quality aluminum foil, the confetti balloons are made of latex, all the balloons are ,durable, strong and light. Just filling 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely

Easy to Assemble & Deflate: It supports helium or air, after filling, the valve of the aluminum foil balloon is automatically closed, it is recommended to pinch the self-sealing valve to prevent air leakage. these number balloons have holes at the top and can be stringed or hung with ribbon; Also be attached to walls, windows or doors

Wide Application:The shiny number 20 mylar foil Balloons with pack of 6 confetti latex balloons is ideal for girls women 20th birthday party balloons, as a backdrop or photo props, pool party, men and women 20th anniversary event wedding party, baby shower party, engagement ceremony, graduation party decorations supplies

Digital 20 Balloons: Your 20th birthday party decorations will be much more decent and vivid by hanging the 20 number balloons. Very nice gloss with bright color and big size for 20th birthday party decors. You will be very satisfied
